round_note: Signal/learnability phase. Validates that the strongest known signal (negated reversal, IC 0.044) can be made pipeline-compatible with a minimal per-day score-tail truncation. Not feature engineering. Not composite. Not data acquisition.
research_question: 对 negated reversal 做每日 cross-sectional 极值尾部截断（排除 top 1% / top 2% 再重排），是否能同时保留 >= 0.040 的高 IC 并恢复 Top10 label 方向为正？
change_detail: 在 negated reversal score 上新增 per-day tail exclusion 预处理步骤。每个 signal_date: (1) 按 negated reversal raw score 降序排列所有股票, (2) 计算该日 score 的 p99/p98 横截面阈值, (3) 排除 raw score 严格超过该阈值的股票, (4) 在剩余股票中重新按 score 降序排列, (5) 从重排后的 universe 取 TopK=10。阈值基于 raw negated reversal score 计算(非 rank score, 非 composite), 按每个 signal_date 横截面独立计算(非全局统一阈值)。排除后不补位。不改变: oracle label 定义, 数据源, snapshot, contract, TopK, 执行语义, 成本模型, portfolio refresh rule。

implementation.step_1: Per signal_date, rank all stocks by negated reversal raw score descending
implementation.step_2: Compute 99th percentile of raw scores for that signal_date (cross-sectional)
implementation.step_3: Exclude all stocks with raw score strictly above daily p99 from eligible pool
implementation.step_4: Re-rank remaining stocks by negated reversal raw score descending
implementation.step_5: Select TopK=10 from re-ranked remaining universe
implementation.threshold_type: per signal_date cross-sectional percentile on raw negated reversal score
implementation.exclusion_scope: excluded stocks removed from pool entirely for that date; no gap-filling

implementation.step_2: Compute 98th percentile of raw scores for that signal_date (cross-sectional)
implementation.step_3: Exclude all stocks with raw score strictly above daily p98 from eligible pool
implementation.step_4: Re-rank remaining stocks by negated reversal raw score descending
implementation.step_5: Select TopK=10 from re-ranked remaining universe
implementation.threshold_type: per signal_date cross-sectional percentile on raw negated reversal score
implementation.exclusion_scope: excluded stocks removed from pool entirely for that date; no gap-filling

success_rules.core_pass_condition: At least one candidate passes all 4 criteria (2 learnability + 2 pipeline). If both pass, the candidate with higher Top10-Bot10 spread is preferred.
success_rules.stop_condition: Neither candidate passes all 4 criteria — reversal cannot be salvaged with simple tail truncation alone. Either accept reversal as ranking-only signal, or defer to later phase with more sophisticated tail modeling.
success_rules.ic_computation_method: Spearman rank correlation (CORR of score vs oracle label_5d_next_open_close). Daily IC aggregated over all trading days in trainval snapshot where >= 20 stocks have non-null scores and labels. Bootstrap CI: 10,000 resamples, seed=42.

exclusions.winsorization: Excluded from formal candidates. Diagnosis showed it restores direction but with weaker spread (+0.0015 vs +0.0040+ for exclusion).
exclusions.exclude_top_5pct: Excluded. Over-kill — spread degrades relative to 2% exclusion.
exclusions.per_year_or_regime_conditional_threshold: Excluded. Adds complexity without clear benefit for a first validation.
exclusions.reversal_composite_with_cord30: Excluded. First prove tail-handled reversal works standalone.

serial_rule: 如果通过，下一阶段主线改为 tail-aware signal construction within existing feature space。如果不过，reversal 降级为 ranking-only signal 或延后处理，同时重开 data acquisition 讨论。
